Northwatch Systems builds Blackridge Runtime Gateway, AI runtime economics infrastructure for enterprise inference spend. BRG sits between AI applications and model providers to make inference spend attributable, explainable, and controllable.

The one-workflow assessment is the entry motion for evaluating BRG. It uses logs, traces, gateway exports, provider events, runtime metadata, and scoped runtime evidence to determine whether BRG should be deployed for ongoing control.
